subject: White-haired humanoid fighter firing a dark corrupted energy beam, dramatic corrupted energy effects
description: A male-presenting figure with white hair is shown in an intense firing pose, both hands or arms directed forward as a dark, corrupted energy beam erupts outward. The energy is rendered in dark purples and blacks with crackling effects, giving the impression of corrupted or tainted ki rather than the classic bright blue Kamehameha. The figure's expression is strained or blank, consistent with being under an outside influence. The background is consumed by the dark energy explosion. The overall composition is dominated by the beam and the destructive energy surrounding it.
foreground: White-haired fighter firing dark corrupted energy beam, hands extended forward
background: Dark energy explosion, corrupted ki effects, purple-black
emotion: strained blankness, controlled-against-will tension, overwhelming dark power
